title: Inventory and variable precedence
description: Hosts and groups define scope, and variables resolve through a defined precedence from defaults to extra-vars.
body: Use when a host ends up with an unexpected variable value. Inventory organizes hosts into groups; variables can be set at role defaults, group_vars, host_vars, play vars, and extra-vars, resolved by a fixed precedence where extra-vars win and defaults lose. Do not assume the nearest-looking definition wins — precedence, not proximity, decides. Actions: trace the value through the precedence order. Validation signals include the resolved value matching the intended source. Risk boundary: an unexpected override can point a play at the wrong environment, so confirm prod-versus-nonprod resolution.
